name: MAHLE Metal Leve S.A.
summary: MAHLE Metal Leve S.A. manufactures and sells engine systems and components, filtration, and thermal management products worldwide. The company offers piston systems and cylinder components for use in two-wheeled vehicles, passenger cars, commercial vehicles, and large engines; filters, pump systems, and oil coolers for engine and transmission applications; storage systems; and electronics and mechatronic components, such as electric drives, actuators and auxiliaries, and control and power electronic products. It also supplies a portfolio of products and services, such as engine parts, filters, turbochargers, and mechatronics components; products for thermal management, vehicle diagnostics, exhaust gas analyzers, and service equipment for maintaining HVAC systems and automatic transmissions for use in the original equipment quality to the trade and automotive workshops. The company was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Mogi Gua√É¬ßu, Brazil.
